title: audit — feature keys
description: Feature keys published against feature-flag::FeatureFlag. Distinct from feature-flags.json (which is the pennant kill-switch panel — for ops emergency use). These are tenant-facing capabilities gated by plan tier.

features.description: Master enable for audit capture. Every tenant baseline. Off in feature manifest = a tenant explicitly asked to be off-audit (extremely rare, requires legal sign-off, never actually shipped as a plan variant).
Enables POST /api/v1/audits/export. Non-entitled tenants must open a support ticket for exports.

Enables kind=regulator on the export request. Payload includes chain-of-custody metadata + signed manifest (HMAC-SHA256 with the platform's regulator-signing key from Doppler). Cross-application rollup (Enterprise only).
Enables creating an AuditRetentionPolicy with retention_years > 7 (up to 10). Requires an override_reason.
Enables ?include=raw_diff on the audit show/list endpoints. Compliance-officer scoped by permission. Every reveal writes a chain-of-custody meta-audit row.
Enables the tenant-level opt-in for redacting PII in old_values + new_values at save time. Regulator-strict tenants may want it; most keep it off. See settings.audit.redact_pii_in_old_new_values.
Enables the weekly ExportAuditsToArchiveJob for tenants past the hot-window row-count threshold. Reduces primary DB storage cost while preserving compliance retention.
Enables the GenerateComplianceReportJob monthly per-tenant run. Payload conforms to regulator export schemas. Uploaded to archive bucket with S3 object-lock (compliance mode, 7y retention).
